skills.name: Vengeful Slash
skills.description: Single-target slash, builds 1 Grudge Mark stack, max 3

skills.name: Crimson Reprisal
skills.description: Large AoE slash, heals per enemy hit

skills.name: Grudge Shot
skills.description: Single shot, builds Powder Mark. Hitscan 30m range.

skills.name: Quick Reload
skills.description: Rapidly cycle the chamber, +40% attack speed for 4s

skills.name: Smoke Shot
skills.description: Fire a flashbang round, blinding enemies in 4m

skills.name: Explosive Round
skills.description: Fire incendiary shell that explodes on impact

skills.name: Flame Burst

skills.name: Sniper Round
skills.description: Steady aim, charged shot that pierces armor at extreme range

skills.name: Hellfire Barrage
skills.description: Unload entire magazine in sustained fire, AoE incendiary

skills.name: Crimson Blast
skills.description: Blood-infused shell that heals on hit, AoE splash

skills.name: Shadow Shot
skills.description: Void-touched round that silences on impact and leaves darkness

skills.name: Cannon Execute
skills.description: Overcharged shot that deals 3x damage to targets below 25% HP

skills.name: Demon Blast
skills.description: Channel dark energy into the barrel, releasing a massive explosion that sends enemies flying

skills.name: Thunder Blast
skills.description: Summon a lightning storm through the barrel, chain-electrocuting all enemies in range

mechanic.description: Toggle F (block) — shield type replaces mainhand slots 1–3 with tank abilities. Slots 4–5 unchanged.

skills.name: Quick Deflect
skills.description: Rapid parry while blocking — minimal recovery

skills.name: Riposte
skills.description: Counter immediately after a perfect block

skills.name: Flurry Guard
skills.description: Chain rapid blocks, each faster than the last

skills.name: Shield Bash
skills.description: Light bash that staggers — only while blocking

skills.name: Shadow Step Block
skills.description: Teleport behind attacker after perfect block

skills.name: Spectral Mark
skills.description: Bash applies ghost-mark reducing enemy accuracy

skills.name: Wraith Barrage
skills.description: Unleash stored parry energy as rapid strikes

skills.name: Kite Guard
skills.description: Balanced block stance — moderate DR while blocking

skills.name: Grudge Taunt
skills.description: Force enemies in 6m to target you while blocking

skills.name: Iron Fortress
skills.description: Maximum block — taunt all nearby while blocking

skills.name: Enduring Wall
skills.description: Blocking does not consume stamina for 4s

skills.name: Shield Strike
skills.description: Bash with shield edge — damage + stagger

skills.name: Retaliation Aura
skills.description: 5% of damage taken reflected while blocking

skills.name: Bloodguard Rush
skills.description: Charge with shield — knock enemies aside

skills.name: Spell Ward
skills.description: Raise shield to absorb incoming spell

skills.name: Oath Shatter
skills.description: Break enemy buff on perfect block

skills.name: Bloodline Bond
skills.description: Link HP with ally — share damage 50/50

skills.name: Dragon Barrier
skills.description: Fire dragon head — breathe fire cone

skills.name: Grudge Taunt
skills.description: Force all enemies in 8m to target you

skills.name: Cleaving Strike
skills.description: Wide arc slash hitting all in front

skills.name: Judgement Cut

skills.name: Apocalypse Edge
skills.description: Massive AoE ground slam with shockwave

skills.name: Dimensional Rift
skills.description: Tear reality with blade, pulling enemies

skills.name: War Cry
skills.description: AoE fear, allies gain attack speed

skills.name: Blood Reaper
skills.description: Become death incarnate, chain kills reset CD

skills.name: Sweeping Stab

mechanic.description: Toggle F (same as shield) — with a 1H mainhand, tome replaces mainhand slots 1–3 with coupled spell variants. Slots 4–5 unchanged.

elemental.name: Elemental
elemental.description: Slots become elemental spell variants (fire, frost, lightning, nature)

skills.name: Elemental Bolt
skills.description: Channel tome element through mainhand strike

skills.name: Arcane Orb
skills.description: Slow heavy orb with large impact

skills.name: Arcane Snare
skills.description: Ranged root — binds target in place

skills.name: Arcane Barrage
skills.description: Rain of arcane bolts across area

heal.name: Heal
heal.description: Slots become healing and support variants

skills.description: Melee strike that heals self and ally

skills.name: Healing Wave
skills.description: Pulse of holy energy — party heal

skills.name: Spirit Surge

skills.name: Sanctuary
skills.description: Create zone of total healing immunity

buff.name: Buff

skills.description: Slow time in zone, speed allies
